input.background: We calculate the $95 \%$ confidence interval for $\mu_1-\mu_2$ for the cholesterol illustrative data (see Table 12.5).
input.question: Calculate the difference between the sample means: $\bar{x}_1-\bar{x}_2=6.192-5.414$.

mu_1.description: Population mean of the first group.

mu_2.description: Population mean of the second group.

x_bar_1.description: Sample mean of the first group.

x_bar_2.description: Sample mean of the second group.

difference_of_means.description: Difference between the sample means of the two groups.
